query:
INSERT INTO collateralItems (name, description, productLine, fileKey, fileUrl, fileName, fileMimeType, applicationTags, sectorTags, keywordTags, uploadedBy, uploadedByName, isActive) VALUES
(
  'Sykes Acoustic Range - Noise-Attenuated Dewatering Pumps',
  'The Sykes Acoustic Range provides fully automatic priming dewatering pumps with noise-attenuated enclosures for noise-sensitive environments. Ideal for urban construction, residential areas, and sites with strict noise regulations. Models include acoustic-enclosed variants of the standard Sykes pump range.',
  'dewatering',
  'sykes/sykes-acoustic-range-product-sheet.pdf',
  'https://sykesgroup.com/product-category/pumps/sykes-acoustic-range/',
  'Sykes Acoustic Range Product Sheet',
  'text/html',
  JSON_ARRAY('dewatering', 'construction_dewatering', 'urban_construction', 'noise_sensitive'),
  JSON_ARRAY('mining', 'infrastructure'),
  JSON_ARRAY('acoustic pump', 'noise attenuated pump', 'silent pump', 'Sykes acoustic', 'dewatering', 'automatic priming', 'construction dewatering', 'urban dewatering', 'Sykes Group'),
  3630009,
  'Dan Day',
  1
),
(
  'Sykes Medium Head Pumps - MH Series',
  'Sykes Medium Head Pumps deliver reliable dewatering performance for medium-pressure applications. Fully automatic priming with robust construction for abrasive and corrosive fluids. Models: MH150, MH220, MH300, MH450. Ideal for construction site dewatering, mining pit drainage, and civil infrastructure projects.',
  'dewatering',
  'sykes/sykes-medium-head-product-sheet.pdf',
  'https://sykesgroup.com/product-category/pumps/sykes-medium-head/',
  'Sykes Medium Head (MH Series) Product Sheet',
  'text/html',
  JSON_ARRAY('dewatering', 'construction_dewatering', 'mine_dewatering', 'civil_works'),
  JSON_ARRAY('mining', 'infrastructure'),
  JSON_ARRAY('medium head pump', 'MH150', 'MH220', 'MH300', 'MH450', 'Sykes MH', 'dewatering', 'automatic priming', 'construction dewatering', 'mine dewatering', 'Sykes Group'),
  3630009,
  'Dan Day',
  1
),
(
  'Sykes High Head Pumps - HH Series',
  'Sykes High Head Pumps are engineered for high-pressure dewatering in challenging mining and construction environments. Handles solids up to 65mm. Fully automatic priming. Models: HH80, HH135, HH160i, HH220i, HH300. Perfect for deep well dewatering, mine dewatering, and high-rise water supply.',
  'dewatering',
  'sykes/sykes-high-head-product-sheet.pdf',
  'https://sykesgroup.com/product-category/pumps/sykes-high-head/',
  'Sykes High Head (HH Series) Product Sheet',
  'text/html',
  JSON_ARRAY('dewatering', 'mine_dewatering', 'deep_well_dewatering', 'high_pressure'),
  JSON_ARRAY('mining', 'infrastructure', 'oil_gas'),
  JSON_ARRAY('high head pump', 'HH80', 'HH135', 'HH160i', 'HH220i', 'HH300', 'Sykes HH', 'mine dewatering', 'deep dewatering', 'automatic priming', 'solids handling', 'Sykes Group'),
  3630009,
  'Dan Day',
  1
),
(
  'Sykes Extra High Head Pumps - XH Series',
  'Sykes Extra High Head Pumps deliver unmatched performance for extreme dewatering applications — deep mines, quarries, and large-scale construction. Increased shaft stiffness for very high pressures. Models: XH100, XH150, XH200, XH250, XH300. Ideal for mining, industrial processes, and large construction projects.',
  'dewatering',
  'sykes/sykes-extra-high-head-product-sheet.pdf',
  'https://sykesgroup.com/product-category/pumps/sykes-extra-high-head/',
  'Sykes Extra High Head (XH Series) Product Sheet',
  'text/html',
  JSON_ARRAY('dewatering', 'mine_dewatering', 'deep_well_dewatering', 'high_pressure', 'extreme_dewatering'),
  JSON_ARRAY('mining', 'infrastructure', 'oil_gas'),
  JSON_ARRAY('extra high head pump', 'XH100', 'XH150', 'XH200', 'XH250', 'XH300', 'Sykes XH', 'deep mine dewatering', 'extreme pressure pump', 'automatic priming', 'Sykes Group', 'mine dewatering'),
  3630009,
  'Dan Day',
  1
),
(
  'Sykes Contractor Low Head Pumps - CP Series',
  'The Sykes Contractor Low Head range delivers high flow rates for applications not requiring significant vertical lift. Fully automatic priming, dry-run capable with oil bath mechanical seal. Models: CP80i, CP100i, CP150iC, CP150i, CP220i, CP250i, CP300i, CP310. Ideal for construction site drainage, flood recovery, and civil works.',
  'dewatering',
  'sykes/sykes-contractor-low-head-product-sheet.pdf',
  'https://sykesgroup.com/product-category/pumps/sykes-contractor-low-head/',
  'Sykes Contractor Low Head (CP Series) Product Sheet',
  'text/html',
  JSON_ARRAY('dewatering', 'construction_dewatering', 'flood_recovery', 'civil_works', 'low_head'),
  JSON_ARRAY('mining', 'infrastructure'),
  JSON_ARRAY('low head pump', 'contractor pump', 'CP80i', 'CP100i', 'CP150i', 'CP150iC', 'CP220i', 'CP250i', 'CP300i', 'CP310', 'Sykes CP', 'high flow pump', 'automatic priming', 'dry run pump', 'flood recovery', 'Sykes Group'),
  3630009,
  'Dan Day',
  1
),
(
  'Sykes Sewage & Waste Pumps - SW Series',
  'The Sykes Sewage & Waste Range handles demanding wastewater applications including large solids up to 110mm. Chops and shreds debris to prevent clogging. Available in compressor, vacuum, or diaphragm priming. Models: SW100, SW150, SW250, SW310. Ideal for sewer bypass, wastewater treatment, and civil infrastructure.',
  'dewatering',
  'sykes/sykes-sewage-waste-product-sheet.pdf',
  'https://sykesgroup.com/product-category/pumps/sewage-waste-range/',
  'Sykes Sewage & Waste (SW Series) Product Sheet',
  'text/html',
  JSON_ARRAY('dewatering', 'sewage', 'wastewater', 'sewer_bypass', 'civil_works'),
  JSON_ARRAY('infrastructure'),
  JSON_ARRAY('sewage pump', 'waste pump', 'SW100', 'SW150', 'SW250', 'SW310', 'Sykes SW', 'sewer bypass', 'wastewater pump', 'solids handling', 'chopper pump', 'Sykes Group', 'sewage bypass'),
  3630009,
  'Dan Day',
  1
),
(
  'Sykes Yakka V2 - Compact Versatile Pump Range',
  'The Sykes Yakka V2 is one of the world''s most versatile pump solutions for 3-, 4-, and 6-inch pump applications. Single-axle trailer for manoeuvrability. Bunded fuel tank, heavy-duty battery, external control panel. Models: Yakka V2 150, Yakka V2 100, Yakka V2 SW100, Yakka V2 HH80. Ideal for mining, construction, sewer bypass, and rental.',
  'dewatering',
  'sykes/sykes-yakka-v2-product-sheet.pdf',
  'https://sykesgroup.com/product-category/pumps/sykes-yakka/',
  'Sykes Yakka V2 Product Sheet',
  'text/html',
  JSON_ARRAY('dewatering', 'construction_dewatering', 'mine_dewatering', 'sewer_bypass', 'rental'),
  JSON_ARRAY('mining', 'infrastructure'),
  JSON_ARRAY('Yakka V2', 'Yakka V2 150', 'Yakka V2 100', 'Yakka V2 SW100', 'Yakka V2 HH80', 'compact pump', 'trailer pump', 'portable pump', 'Sykes Yakka', 'versatile pump', 'pump rental', 'sewer bypass', 'Sykes Group'),
  3630009,
  'Dan Day',
  1
);
